description: Observe a Precisely Connect ETL job run as a Dagster source asset. Status-only — Precisely owns the run; Dagster surfaces its state.

outputs.description: Observation result with run status + flags

job_run_id.label: Job Run ID
job_run_id.description: Precisely Connect ETL job-run ID to observe.

host_env_var.label: Host Env Var
host_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely Connect host URL

api_token_env_var.label: Api Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely API token

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on

description.label: Description
description.description: Asset description shown in the Dagster catalog.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog.

name: Precisely Run Observation Asset
